top_gap_prompt: What is the best CRM for SDR teams at B2B companies?
category_long: B2B sales intelligence and outreach platform

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Apollo.io's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Apollo.io's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Apollo.io lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best CRM for SDR teams at B2B companies?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Recommended CRM tools for SDR teams at B2B companies companies
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable CRM tools instead of Outreach
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
